recommendations.title: The One I Love
recommendations.overview: Ethan and Sophie are a married couple on the brink of separation when, at the urging of their therapist, they decide to salvage their relationship by escaping to a beautiful vacation house for the weekend.

recommendations.title: Fatima
recommendations.overview: Fatima, an Algerian-born woman who now lives in France with her two teenage daughters, with whom she is barely able to communicate.

recommendations.title: Doraemon the Movie: Nobita's Little Star Wars 2021
recommendations.genres: Animation, Science Fiction, Adventure, Family, Fantasy, Comedy
recommendations.overview: During summer vacation Nobita picks up a small rocket containing Papi, a palm-sized alien president escaping rebels on his home planet Pirika.

recommendations.title: The Benefactor
recommendations.overview: A newly married couple are forced to navigate the all-consuming interest of a powerful, mysterious, and possessive philanthropist.

recommendations.title: My Boyfriend's Meds
recommendations.overview: A Woman's island getaway with her boyfriend is thrown for a loop when he forgets to take his prescription medications along.

recommendations.title: Luna's Revenge

recommendations.title: Vacation Friends
recommendations.overview: When a straight-laced couple that has fun with a rowdy couple on vacation in Mexico return to the States, they discover that the crazy couple they met in Mexico followed them back home and decide to play tricks on them.

recommendations.title: Eddie the Eagle
